segments.speaker: 题目6/7
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Lia, you've been taking guitar lessons, right? How's that going? It's good. I'm having fun. And there are four, five songs. I can play pretty well. Now I've been think I just finished a big work project, so I've got some spare time. If you will wait here a minute, I'll give you my teachers information. She's great. Do you do IT online or in person? I took a few lessons in person to get started. It's helpful to have someone show you some basic things. But now we do IT online and IT works well.
